calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

All parties were sworn to testify prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Baari Wardlow, Petitioner, appeared in propria persona.

Zhi Jen Chen "Gigi", Respondent, appeared in propria persona and was assisted in English/Cantonese translation by Niya Xie (Daughter). Niya Xie was sworn to translate the proceedings to the best of her ability.

Jamil Wardlow, Son of Albert Wardlow/Interested Party, was also present.

Edward Louis, Friend of Albert Wardlow/Interested Party, was also present.

The Court hears testimony, and after hearing testimony, the Petitioner's request is Denied for the reasons set forth on the record.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
